benefits.description: Significant appetite suppression when dose increased from 1mg to 2mg weekly; appetite returned after a month at 2mg weekly, requiring dosing when cravings returned

side_effects.description: No appetite at all for first couple days after dose increase

protocol_notes: Started at 1mg weekly, titrated to 2mg weekly after a few weeks. Currently dosing 2mg twice weekly (4mg/week) after 4 months. Uses PRN dosing when food cravings return every 3-4 days. Notes need to count up macros and not forget micronutrients and vitamins due to appetite suppression. Mentions some people need up to 12mg weekly (upper end of studies).
